text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models: A Survey" was found on the official website of the lead author, Tianxin Wei, and is documented in an associated GitHub repository for agentic reasoning research. It is a real and widely cited survey paper authored by the individuals listed.

LINK: https://github.com/weitianxin/Awesome-Agentic-Reasoning
FOUND_TITLE: Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models: A Survey
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianxin Wei, Ting-Wei Li, Zhining Liu, Xuying Ning, Ze Yang, Jiaru Zou, Zhichen Zeng, Ruizhong Qiu, Xiao Lin, Dongqi Fu, Zihao Li, Mengting Ai, Duo Zhou, Wenxuan Bao, Yunzhe Li, Gaotang Li, Cheng Qian, Yu Wang, Xiangru Tang, Yin Xiao, Liri Fang, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Yuji Zhang, Chi Wang, Jiaxuan You, Heng Ji, Hanghang Tong, Jingrui He
FOUND_YEAR: 2026
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
